headline: A Look Back at HR Software Stocks’ Q4 Earnings: Paycom (NYSE:PAYC) Vs The Rest Of The Pack
summary: As the Q4 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the hr software industry, including Paycom (NYSE:PAYC) and its peers.
